description_long: This is a robust, rectangular outdoor trash bin with a domed lid and a wide, rectangular opening for depositing litter. The bin is predominantly dark, weathered metal with yellow trim and features a clear pictogram of a person throwing trash into a basket, along with the word 'LITTER' in bold yellow letters on the front. The surface shows signs of wear and exposure, suggesting it is designed for heavy use in public urban environments such as parks or sidewalks. The lid is integrated and slightly overhangs the body, providing some protection from rain. There are no visible handles or wheels, indicating it is likely intended to remain stationary. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, matte finish and a utilitarian design focused on durability and visibility.
description: A sturdy, dark metal trash bin with a domed lid, yellow trim, and clear 'LITTER' signage and pictogram. Designed for outdoor urban use, it features a wide opening and a weathered, durable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'LITTER' label and pictogram clearly, with the wide opening and domed lid visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the front signage and opening, with more of the right side of the bin visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the previous, with the left side of the bin more visible but still showing the front signage.
description_view_3: View showing the front signage and opening, with the left edge of the bin more prominent.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Yellow 'LITTER' text and pictogram of a person throwing trash into a basket
